findings.description: Missing state seal image in the document header.
findings.evidence: The top center of the PDF page contains the North Carolina state seal image, which is completely absent from the HTML rendering.

findings.description: Missing department logo image in the document footer.
findings.evidence: The bottom left of the PDF page contains the DEQ logo image, which is missing from the HTML rendering.
The PDF includes a handwritten signature image above 'Judith A. Wehner', but this image is absent in the HTML version.
